faults.name: Feedback capacitor open
faults.why: Without the feedback capacitor the integrator loses its defining current path.
faults.verification_test: Power off and verify the feedback capacitor is connected from output to inverting input.
faults.fix_recipe: Reconnect the feedback capacitor and retest with a square wave.

faults.name: Reset/leak resistor missing
faults.why: A practical integrator needs a DC path to prevent slow saturation from input offset.
faults.verification_test: Watch output DC drift with zero input.
faults.fix_recipe: Add the specified parallel reset resistor across the feedback capacitor.

faults.name: Input resistor wrong value
faults.why: The integration slope is proportional to 1/(Rin*C), so a wrong Rin changes ramp rate.
faults.verification_test: Compare ramp slope against the expected Rin*C time constant.
faults.fix_recipe: Replace Rin with the calculated value.
